heading: Hobbies
intro: Outside of coursework and projects, I invest time in creative and community-focused activities.

items.name: Reading
items.description: I enjoy books on product thinking, technology, and leadership.
details: Maintains notes and action items from each book.

items.name: Photography
items.description: I capture city scenes and campus events.
details: Focus on color and storytelling through composition.
Occasionally volunteers to document student events.

items.name: Community Mentoring
items.description: I mentor beginner developers through short practical sessions.
details: Covers fundamentals like Git, APIs, and testing.
Helps peers build confidence by shipping small projects.
